# Copilot Instructions

> **See also:** [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) for remaining playbooks and operational guidelines.

## Project Overview

This project is a Virtual filesystem (VFS) module to expose a native filesystem to support access via multiple protocols including NFS and S3. It provides a distributed File/Object store as a POSIX-compliant filesystem. The VFS will support standard file operations and be designed for high performance, scalability, and reliability in production environments.
